SANFRAN_WARNING_CHASE: The van is about to escape!
SANFRAN_WARNING_LEAVING_ROAD: You are about to leave the engagement.
SANFRAN_WARNING_LEAVING_SQUAD: You are about to abandon your squad.
SANFRAN_WARNING_SKIP_OBJECTIVE: You are about to abandon your objective!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADL_DOTHESESONSOFBI: ^2Admiral Kelly: ^7Do these sons of bitches think they can take down the seventh fleet, they're in for a big surprise.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADL_SENTINELONEWHAT: ^2Admiral Kelly: ^7Sentinel One, what the hell is going on up there.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADL_SERGEANTCORMACK: ^2Admiral Kelly: ^7Sergeant Cormack, I need a god damned sit-rep.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADL_SONOFABITCHMAN: ^2Admiral Kelly: ^7Son of a bitch, man battlestations.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADS_COPYSENTINELZER: ^2Admiral Davis: ^7Copy Sentinel-zero-one. Everything looks business as usual. We sure this is solid, Major?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADS_SENTINELZEROONE: ^2Kingpin: ^7Sentinel-zero-one, the carrier is almost clear of the bridge.
^2Kingpin: ^7Sentinel-zero-one, this is Kingpin. What's your status?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ADS_THECARRIERISREP: ^2Admiral Davis: ^7The carrier is reporting a mass casualty situation!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ALX_SOMETHINGSGOING: ^2Alexi: ^7Something's going on with those cargo ships!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_ALX_WEVEGOTTWOCARGO: ^2Alexi: ^7We've got two cargo ships inbound from the west. MASINT greenlighted them.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALCLEARYOU: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral, Clear your men off the deck!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALDAVISTHI: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral Davis, this is Sentinel-zero-one. We've established a perimeter around the fleet, over.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALKELLYTHE: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral Kelly, the van is secured, and the Atlas for has been,... what the hell?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALWEAREENG: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, we are engaged with a large Atlas force on the bridge. We need to blockade any incoming ships.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALWEHAVEEN: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral, we have enemy targets on the bridge. Code red on all units.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALWEREINTH: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral, we're in the mix with a large Atlas force on the bridge.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ADMIRALYOUVEGOT: ^2Cormack: ^7Admiral, you've got 30 plus FABS heading your way.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ALLUNITSWEHAVEM: ^2Cormack: ^7All units, we have multiple Atlas vehicles converging on the bridge! I need an immediate three-sixty around the fleet!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_ATLASVEHICLESAR: ^2Cormack: ^7Atlas vehicles are deploying soldiers! They're closing on your position!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_BURKETHEVANISLA: ^2Cormack: ^7Burke, the van is lame duck. We've got them pinned, dead center of the span.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_GIDEONWEVEGOTTH: ^2Cormack: ^7Gideon, we've got the van pinned, dead center of the span.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_GIDEONYOUHAVEEX: ^2Cormack: ^7You have execute authority to take that van down.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_KEEPEMONICEUNTI: ^2Cormack: ^7Keep 'em on ice until the fleet is clear of the bridge.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_KINGPINWEHAVEEN: ^2Cormack: ^7Kingpin, we have enemy targets on the bridge. Code Red on all units.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_NEGITIVEWECANNO: ^2Cormack: ^7Negative we can not go kinetic, too many civilians.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_PUTTHOSEBIRDSON: ^2Cormack: ^7Put those birds on the ground now! Do not let them get away!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_THEFLEETSONTHEM: ^2Cormack: ^7The fleet's on the move. All units report in.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_THERECOULDBEANY: ^2Cormack: ^7There could be anything inside that van. Pursue but do not engage.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_WEARESENDINGMEN: ^2Cormack: ^7We are sending men to assist, Admiral.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_WEHAVEENEMYTARG: ^2Cormack: ^7We have enemy targets on the bridge. Code red, repeat, code red.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_WEVEGOTAHIGHHEA: ^2Cormack: ^7We've got a high heat signature coming out that van. Could be thermobaric.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_WHYHASNTSOMEONE: ^2Cormack: ^7Why hasn't someone put a bullet in that driver? Where's my sniper team?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_CRK_YESSIR: ^2Cormack: ^7Yes sir. Irons is making his move.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_CAREFULNOWSLOWI: ^2Gideon: ^7Careful now, slow is smooth, smooth is fast.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_COPY: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy. Mitchell, open fire on the van.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_COPYTHATWEREMOV: ^2Gideon: ^7Copy that, we're moving! Careful now, slow is smooth, smooth is fast...
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_CORMACKOURPITBU: ^2Gideon: ^7You good? Cormack, our Pitbull's out of action. Proceeding on foot!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_CORMACKTHATVANS: ^2Gideon: ^7Cormack, that van's armored up. Hit it with something harder.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_HOWTHEHELLDIDIS: ^2Gideon: ^7How the hell did ISR miss these bastards?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_INEEDSCHEMATICS: ^2Gideon: ^7I need schematics of the carrier. That thing's massive.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_MITCHELLENGAGEY: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, engage your boosters! We need to get over this wreck!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_MITCHELLYOUSTIL: ^2Gideon: ^7Mitchell, you still in one piece? Goddamn.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_NORTHSIDEISALLC: ^2Gideon: ^7North side is all clear--wait, what's he playing at?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_WENEEDTHESECIVI: ^2Gideon: ^7We need these civilians off the bridge!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_WHATTHEHELLARET: ^2Gideon: ^7What the hell are they after. The ships dead.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_GDN_WHITEVANWITHCOM: ^2Gideon: ^7White van with commercial plates just jumped the checkpoint! We're in pursuit!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_KGN_COPYTHAT: ^2Kingpin: ^7Copy that. We are sending assets to assist.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_LLT_WAVINGOFFCOMING: ^2Littlebird Pilot: ^7Waving off, coming around for a new angle.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_MDX_CORMACKWEVEGOTT: ^2Knox: ^7Cormack, we've got two cargo ships inbound from the west. MASINT greenlighted them.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_MDX_ITHOUGHTTHOSEGO: ^2Knox: ^7I thought those god damned ships checked out.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_MDX_MOREBOATSINCOMI: ^2Knox: ^7More boats incoming, they just crippled our destroyer.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_MDX_THREEMOREVEHICL: ^2Knox: ^7Three more vehicles just broke the checkpoint! They're heading your way!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_MDX_WEATHERSCLEARCI: ^2Knox: ^7Weather's clear city side, everything looks business as usual. We sure this is solid?
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN1_GETOFFTHEBRIDGE: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7Get off the bridge! Get off the bridge!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN1_GETTHOSECIVILIA: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7Get those civilians out of there!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN1_MYENTIRESQUADIS: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7My entire squad is gone! Repeat, my squad is dead!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN1_THEYDROPPEDTHEB: ^2Sentinel Operative 1: ^7They dropped the bridge right on the carrier!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN2_GETTHEHELLOUTOF: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7Get the hell out of there!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN2_ONTHEGROUND: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7On the ground!  On the goddamn ground!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN2_SIERRAZEROTWOSI: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7Sierra zero two, Sierra zero four, ingress from the north. Request you be on station in 5 mikes.
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN2_THECARRIERSDEAD: ^2Sentinel Operative 2: ^7The carrier's dead in the water!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN4_WEVEGOTTHEVANBO: ^2Sentinel Operative 4: ^7We've got the van boxed in! 50 meters!
SUBTITLE_SANFRAN_SFA_SN5_OURPITBULLSDEAD: ^2Sentinel Operative 5: ^7Our Pitbull's dead! Target van got past us!
